sub_pixel_system.notes: Racing simulation with 3D polygon environments; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Physics Simulation
special_mechanics.description: Game models realistic car physics with four-wheel vehicle model. Improved vehicle handling courtesy of faster microprocessor (AT&T DSP32C with floating point) compared to predecessor's two-wheel model

special_mechanics.name: Manual Transmission
special_mechanics.description: Realistic manual transmission mode with 4-speed shifter, neutral, reverse, and clutch pedal. Car can stall from mis-shifting

special_mechanics.name: Stunt Courses
special_mechanics.description: Multiple track types featuring stunt elements: corkscrew loop, mountain road, 45° inclined hill, cylindrical tunnel, dual landing ramps, and jump loop

tier_notes: Tier 3: Racing simulation with documented physics improvements over predecessor but no specific movement/gravity parameters available. Game emphasizes realistic car physics modeling rather than character movement mechanics. Wikipedia source provides development notes on physics implementation (four-wheel model, floating-point processor) but not precise parameter values.
